==Biography==
Ezequiel Ramírez is from Buenos Aires, Argentina. He has a true passion for video games, having started with Super Mario 64, The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, and Star Fox 64. Starting at the age of 12, he played Defense of the Ancients for 6 years, and then moved to Lineage 2. Eventually, he heard about League of Legends and began to play it. He began to play ranked as soon as he was Level 30. In 7 months, he reached to 1840 LP and ended Season 2 at Gold. In Season 3, he started in Gold I. Within 2 months, he achieved Diamond I, the first Argentinian to do so.

== Trivia ==
[[File:1984 2016.png|thumb|right|'''1984''' talking about his life in a '''Riot''' section called "Retadores de la Copa".]]
* Began to compete when in 2013 '''Riot''' made a ranking where he was 10th, two weeks later he was in 1st place.<ref name="riot inteview to 1984 2016">[https://www.facebook.com/lolesportsla/videos/1226676554012339 Riot LATAM's Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* Considers himself to have a great mental capacity in the games. Independently of the pressure, he will not give up.<ref name="riot inteview to 1984 2016">[https://www.facebook.com/lolesportsla/videos/1226676554012339 Riot LATAM's Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* Proposed to create a team called [[Hafnet eSports]] with '''Hafman'''.<ref name="riot inteview to 1984 2016">[https://www.facebook.com/lolesportsla/videos/1226676554012339 Riot LATAM's Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* The name '''1984''' came from an [[wikipedia:Nineteen Eighty-Four|Orwell's novel]].
* He likes to read and his favorite genre is science fiction, he is also a fan of Tarantino movies.<ref name="riot inteview to 1984 2016">[https://www.facebook.com/lolesportsla/videos/1226676554012339 Riot LATAM's Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
* On February 11, 2016, he said that the Latin American player lacks experience and that companies create more in the competitive scene.<ref name="riot inteview to 1984 2016">[https://www.facebook.com/lolesportsla/videos/1226676554012339 Riot LATAM's Facebook Post] ''facebook.com''</ref>
